name: Soda Bread#2 - Whole Wheat
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Butter or margarine, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a large cast-iron skillet or baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, mix the flour with the baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add butter and rub it into the flour using handfuls of the mixture and rubbing between palms until no visible pieces remain.
4. In another bowl, combine buttermilk and stir with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
5. Sprinkle about 1/4 cup of remaining flour on a clean surface. Turn out the dough and knead lightly for about 1 minute, incorporating the flour to form a smooth, round loaf about 8 inches in diameter.
6. Place the loaf, smooth side up, in the prepared pan. Cut a deep cross through the center, slicing three-fourths of the way through the dough.
7. Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until the loaf sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom. Cool on a wire rack.
